architect.description: Lead system architect — coordinates the engineering team, delegates to specialized agents (@explore, @dotnet, @angular, @devops, @dba, @security, @ml-ai, @data-platform, @qa). Uses all MCP servers: db-* (7 databases), github, kubernetes, docker, rabbitmq, redis, prometheus, filesystem, playwright, sequential-thinking.

plan.description: Plan agent — produces step-by-step plans before any code changes, never edits files, delegates exploration to @explore. Uses MCP: sequential-thinking for complex problem decomposition.

testing-backend.description: Backend testing agent (.NET xUnit, integration tests with Testcontainers, gRPC contract tests). Uses MCP: db-* for test DB verification, rabbitmq for event bus test inspection, docker for containerized integration test exec.

testing-frontend.description: Frontend testing agent (Angular Jasmine/Karma, Cypress E2E, Playwright, accessibility axe). Uses MCP: playwright for browser automation testing.

validate.description: Validation agent (API contract, schema, FluentValidation, build, config/secrets, migration safety, knowledge index freshness). Uses MCP: db-* for migration verification, docker for container validation, filesystem for config inspection.

check-ui.description: UI check agent (Material theming, accessibility WCAG 2.1 AA, responsive layout, design system). Uses MCP: playwright for visual regression and accessibility testing.

dotnet.description: Senior .NET backend engineer for His.Hope microservices (Clean Architecture, CQRS, DDD, gRPC, EF Core). Uses MCP: db-* (7 databases) for data queries, rabbitmq for event bus debugging, docker for container exec/logs, filesystem for code navigation.

angular.description: Senior Angular frontend engineer for His.Hope SPA (Angular 17, NgRx, Angular Material, RxJS). Uses MCP: filesystem for code navigation and file operations.

devops.description: DevOps / SRE engineer (Kubernetes, Docker, Linkerd, Cilium, Tekton, ArgoCD, Bazel). Uses MCP: kubernetes for pod/deployment/service management, docker for container exec/logs, prometheus for metrics/SLO queries, rabbitmq for event bus health, redis for cache inspection.

dba.description: Database engineer / DBA (CockroachDB, SQL migrations, data modeling, query performance). Uses MCP: db-identity, db-patient, db-appointment, db-clinical, db-lab, db-billing, db-pharmacy for direct SQL queries on all 7 service databases, docker for DB container management.

security.description: Security engineer (Vault, JWT auth, RBAC, Cilium network policies, HIPAA compliance). Uses MCP: redis for JWT token blacklist inspection, github for security audit/secret scanning, kubernetes for network policy verification.

ml-ai.description: ML/AI engineer (model training/serving, Vertex AI, feature store, predictive analytics). Uses MCP: prometheus for model performance metrics, docker for ML container management.

data-platform.description: Data platform engineer (BigQuery, Dataflow, Pub/Sub, dbt, analytics pipelines). Uses MCP: prometheus for pipeline metrics, rabbitmq for event stream inspection.

qa.description: QA / Testing engineer (xUnit, Cypress, Chaos Mesh, k6, contract testing, quality gates). Uses MCP: playwright for E2E browser tests, kubernetes for chaos experiment status, docker for test container management, prometheus for quality/SLO metrics.

dispatcher.description: Intelligent Dispatcher — analyzes feature requests, classifies scope/complexity, selects optimal minimal agent set (including @explore). SMART ENTRY POINT: use before @orchestrator or direct delegation. No MCP usage (router only).

orchestrator.description: Pipeline Orchestrator — full 5-phase pipeline for COMPLEX features only. Coordinates @explore, @docs, @dotnet, @angular, @qa, @check-ui, @security, @git. Activated by @dispatcher when PATH_FULL is selected. Only @orchestrator can green-light @git for commits. Uses MCP indirectly via delegated agents.

docs.description: Documentation agent — ADRs, API docs, service READMEs, changelogs, runbooks, dev guides, knowledge base (capture & verify). Runs in Phase 2 (generate) + Phase 4 (verify) of pipeline. Uses MCP: filesystem for reading/writing docs, github for git operations on doc files.

explore.description: Fast agent specialized for exploring codebases — find files by patterns, search code for keywords, answer questions about the codebase. Uses MCP: filesystem for file navigation and content search.

git.description: Git/GitHub integration agent — stage, commit (Conventional Commits), push, branch, PR. Commits ONLY after quality gate green-light from @orchestrator. Uses MCP: github for GitHub API operations (PRs, issues, search), filesystem for staging files.

e2e-test.description: Playwright E2E UI testing agent — tests ALL Angular routes, forms, dialogs, tables, search, pagination, navigation, error states. Uses Playwright MCP browser automation for comprehensive end-to-end UI validation across all feature modules.

docs.description: Use for architecture decisions and conventions

k8s.description: Use for Kubernetes manifests and deployment configs

vault.description: Use for Vault policies and secrets configuration

docker.description: Use for Docker Compose local dev setup

cockroach.description: Use for CockroachDB migrations and configs

knowledge.description: Use for agent knowledge base: gotchas, patterns, decisions
